routes.name: add_event
routes.description: Add a new event to Apple Calendar

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to add the event to

calendarName.description: Calendar name to add the event to

alarms.description: Alarm offsets in minutes before event

frequency.description: Recurrence frequency: daily, weekly, monthly, yearly

routes.name: delete_event
routes.description: Delete a calendar event by ID

eventId.description: ID of the event to delete

allEvents.description: Whether to delete all recurrences of a repeating event

routes.name: get_events
routes.description: Get upcoming calendar events for the specified number of days

routes.name: get_list
routes.description: Get list of all calendars with details

routes.description: Update an existing calendar event

eventId.description: ID of the event to update

startDate.description: Updated start date in ISO 8601 format

endDate.description: Updated end date in ISO 8601 format

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

availability.description: Updated availability: busy, free, tentative, unavailable

calendarName.description: Calendar name to move the event to

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to move the event to

allEvents.description: Apply changes to all events in a recurring series
